utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six main items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully detailed: (1) Property contains type, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage, features, and location; (2) Financing includes mortgage details such as down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, and fees; (3) Legal_services lists the service name and cost; (4) Moving_services shows service level and cost; (5) Setup_services provides utility package type, cost, and survey cost; (6) Total_budget summarizes property price, all cost components, and total out-of-pocket amount. All items are present and fully specified with appropriate details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution includes a purchased townhouse priced at CAD $820,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the only townhouse-type property is 'Historic Townhouse' priced at CAD $750K and rated 6 — this matches best with the AI's townhouse description (modern, quiet area, family-friendly). The financing solution is a standard 'Mortgage' with 20% down payment and CAD $1,200 fees, which aligns with 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). The legal services chosen are 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). Moving services are 'Standard' (rating 8). The utility setup is 'Basic' (rating 5). The property survey is 'Basic Survey' (rating 7). Therefore, these are the relevant ratings from the ground truth.
